mapper.update: update user_table set last_time= #{lastTime} where id = #{id} and open_id = #{openId};
mapper.select: select nick_name as nickName, image_url as imageUrl from user_table where id = #{id};
select count(*) from user_table where phone = #{userPhone};

SELECT rc_personal.history_view_table.id, rc_learn.invitation_table.type as label, rc_personal.history_view_table.createTime, rc_personal.user_table.nick_name as userName, rc_personal.user_table.image_url as userImgUrl, rc_learn.invitation_table.coverImgUrl as imgUrl, rc_learn.invitation_table.title, rc_learn.invitation_table.likenumber as likeNumber, rc_learn.invitation_table.visitnumber as visitNumber, rc_learn.invitation_table.commentnumber as commentNumber
FROM rc_personal.history_view_table JOIN rc_learn.invitation_table ON history_view_table.viewId = rc_learn.invitation_table.id left JOIN rc_personal.user_table ON rc_personal.user_table.id = rc_learn.invitation_table.userId WHERE history_view_table.userId = #{currentUserId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE basic_info_table
QQ = #{QQ,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
professional = #{professional,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WHERE basic_info_table.userId=#{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT rc_personal.basic_info_table.id, rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId, rc_personal.basic_info_table.sex, rc_personal.basic_info_table.address, rc_personal.basic_info_table.phone, rc_personal.basic_info_table.QQ, rc_personal.basic_info_table.email, rc_personal.basic_info_table.skills_tree_id, rc_personal.basic_info_table.medals, rc_personal.basic_info_table.messageId, rc_personal.basic_info_table.professional, rc_personal.user_table.nick_name as userName
FROM rc_personal.basic_info_table JOIN rc_personal.user_table ON rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId = rc_personal.user_table.id WHERE rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId = #{currentUserId}
mapper.insert: insert into rc_personal.basic_info_table( id, userId, sex, address, phone, QQ, email, skills_tree_id, medals, messageId, professional ) values( #{id}, #{userId}, #{sex}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{QQ}, #{email}, #{skills_tree_id}, #{medals}, #{messageId}, #{professional} )
mapper.select: SELECT rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId, rc_personal.basic_info_table.professional from rc_personal.basic_info_table JOIN rc_personal.user_table ON rc_personal.user_table.id = rc_personal.basic_info_table.userId WHERE rc_personal.user_table.state != 0
SELECT rc_learn.like_user_invitation_table.iid FROM rc_learn.like_user_invitation_table WHERE rc_learn.like_user_invitation_table.uid = #{userId}
select * from rc_learn.invitation_table where userId = #{currentUserId} order by creat_time desc
mapper.update: UPDATE rc_personal.user_table SET study_time_today = IF(study_time_date = CURDATE(), study_time_today + #{minutes}, #{minutes}), study_time_week = IF(YEARWEEK(study_time_date, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1), IF(study_time_date = CURDATE(), study_time_week + #{minutes}, study_time_week + #{minutes} - study_time_today), #{minutes}), study_time_date = CURDATE() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(IF(study_time_date = CURDATE(), study_time_today, 0), 0) AS todayMinutes, COALESCE(IF(YEARWEEK(study_time_date, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1), study_time_week, 0), 0) AS weekMinutes FROM rc_personal.user_table WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE rc_personal.user_table SET is_vip = 1, vip_expire_time = IF(vip_expire_time IS NULL OR vip_expire_time < NOW(), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH), DATE_ADD(vip_expire_time, INTERVAL #{months} MONTH)) WHERE id = #{userId}
